summary.sosovalue: Low volume of community discussion excluding official accounts; primarily promotional shilling for Season 2 airdrop with reminders of final month and EXP farming, mixed with skepticism and demands for substantial rewards (e.g., $5k+ for high grinders), some doubts on payout fairness and human verification.
summary.sodex: Sparse mentions; trader recaps show activity (e.g., $1M weekly volume, SoPoints earning despite losses) and promotions highlighting 150M token trader airdrop pool as more lucrative than SoSoValue S2, indicating cautious optimism focused on volume-based rewards post-zero-fee era.
summary.ssi: Minimal relevant discussion; isolated neutral mention of SSI Staking (TVL $98.47M, APY 20.52%, 487K holders) and ssiMAG7 index down 3%, no strong sentiment or community buzz on SSI Index itself.
